en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains valid company registration information in the Iceland Company Registration Applicability Assessment questionnaire.
Please provide your company's Company Registration ID issued by the Iceland Revenue and Customs agency.

The Official extract from the Business Register or Register of Limited Companies can be obtained directly from the Iceland Revenue and Customs agency or the Icelandic Business Register via online request or contacting the agency.
Please provide your Official extract from the Business Register or Register of Limited Companies.
